Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A man with short black hair and glasses wears a dark pinstripe suit with a purple patterned tie. He stands behind two thin black microphones on stands at a podium. A South Korean flag with a white background and central red and blue symbol is visible to his left. A blue backdrop behind him displays white text in Korean and English reading 'Ministry of National Defense'.

question: Describe the actions performed by individuals in the later segments of the video.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a person in a black puffy jacket touches a plastic bag held by another person; at 15s, the exchange of the bag containing a dark object continues; at 18s, men in dark jackets hold green signs with Korean text; at 19s, a man raises his gloved fist in the crowd.
